text:
All applications concerning disclosure of the said judgments, or any information relating to these proceedings, are reserved to [judge].

The children shall be represented by [Cafcass] / [CAFCASS Cymru] as before on any applications concerning disclosure of the said judgments, or any information relating to these proceedings.

No order for costs save public funding assessment of the costs of the legally aided parties.

Dated [date]
